title: PGTC Ledger Entry
description: Hash-linked append-only record. Each entry links to the previous entry via prev_hash, forming a tamper-evident chain.

entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this ledger entry

entry_type.description: Type of entry (e.g., WAL_PREPARED, WAL_COMMITTED, AUTH_BLOCK, TES_BLOCK, GATE_BLOCK, NONCE_REPLAY)

status.description: Whether the action was allowed or blocked

intent_hash.description: Hash of the canonical intent packet

prev_hash.description: Hash of the previous ledger entry (GENESIS for the first entry)

entry_hash.description: Hash of this entry's canonical content

hash_alg.description: Hash algorithm used for entry_hash (default: SHA-256)

payload.description: Additional structured data for this entry
